summary: The session experienced significant network performance issues, primarily due to an extremely slow external resource taking over 30 seconds to respond, and a critical network error affecting an analytics logging endpoint. While most other requests were fast, these two issues severely impacted overall network health and user experience.

recommendations.action: Optimize server-side processing for the 'slow_external' endpoint. The 30-second Time To First Byte (TTFB) indicates a severe backend bottleneck that needs immediate attention.

Investigate the 'Network error' for the Optimizely engagement log. This could be due to network connectivity issues, ad blockers, or server-side misconfiguration preventing the request from completing successfully.
Review all third-party analytics and logging calls (e.g., Optimizely) to ensure they are non-blocking and fail gracefully without impacting the core user experience or page load times.
